events.title: The Athlete Becomes the Brand
events.scene: The playing days are numbered, but the name is at its peak — endorsements, a clothing line, a broadcast booth, a reality show about the family. The {surname} line can convert athletic fame into a durable commercial empire before the body gives out, or chase one more season of glory while the window is open.
events.researchNote: EX-3 athletic→entertainment pivot: the aging champion who monetizes fame into a lasting brand (the bridge between the two new archetypes).

choices.text: Convert the fame into a commercial empire while it burns brightest
choices.outcome: You turn the jersey into a logo. When the body finally fails, the {surname} name is a brand that no longer needs it.

choices.text: Chase one more championship while the window is still open
choices.outcome: You leave the brand money on the table for the chance at immortality. Win or lose, the {surname} name is spoken of as a legend, not a logo.

events.title: Raising the Next Champions
events.scene: Your children inherit the body and the name, and the spotlight that comes with both. The {surname} line can become a true athletic dynasty — generations of champions, each carrying the legend forward — or let the gift be the founder's alone and pivot the heirs to other fields.
events.researchNote: EX-3 athletic succession beat: the line as a multi-generational sporting dynasty.

choices.text: Forge the heirs into champions — make the name a sporting dynasty
choices.outcome: The {surname} name appears on roster after roster, generation after generation. To wear it is to be expected to win.

choices.text: Let the gift be yours — steer the heirs to broader empires
choices.outcome: You make the family's fame a launch pad, not a cage. The {surname} heirs trade the field for boardrooms and ballots, the legend behind them.
